examples: Love is the antithesis of selfishness.
It is the antithesis of Friedman's flat world.
It is the antithesis of a boutique displaying luxury goods.
Needless to say, this is the antithesis of those who founded the U.S. in the 1790s.
Today, the neo-Darwinian thesis and the Gouldian antithesis may be moving towards some sort of synthesis.
